author: Alyssa Boyle
title: Walmart Buys Vibe.co To Woo SMBs To Streaming
description:
Walmart will buy Vibe.co, a self-serve video ad platform, in hopes of attracting more small and medium-sized advertisers to connected TV.
The post Walmart Buys Vibe.co To Woo SMBs To Streaming appeared first on AdExchanger.
content:
Plastering ads all over New York City subways is one effective way to get attention – including, apparently, from Walmart.
